sections.title: Part 1
sections.passage: You will hear a conversation between a woman and Jack about advice on surfing holidays.

questionGroups.title: Advice on surfing holidays
questionGroups.instructions: Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

content.text:
Jack's advice
Recommends surfing for

content.question: Recommends surfing for ______ holidays in the summer

content.text:
holidays in the summer
Need to be quite

content.question: Need to be quite ______

content.text:
Irish surfing locations
County Clare
Lahinch has some good quality

content.question: Lahinch has some good quality ______ and surf schools

content.text:
and surf schools
There are famous cliffs nearby
County Mayo
Good surf school at

content.question: Good surf school at ______ beach

content.text:
beach
Surf camp lasts for one

content.question: Surf camp lasts for one ______

content.text: Can also explore the local

content.question: Can also explore the local ______ by kayak

content.text:
by kayak

Weather

content.question: Best month to go: ______

content.text:
degrees

Costs
Equipment

content.text:
euros per day

content.text: for warmth

sections.title: Part 2
sections.passage: You will hear a talk about a school's extended hours childcare service.

questionGroups.question: Which TWO facts are given about the school's extended hours childcare service?

options.text: More children attend after school than before school.
An average of 50 children attend in the mornings.
A child cannot attend both the before and after school sessions.
The maximum number of children who can attend is 70.

questionGroups.instructions: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.question: How much does childcare cost for a complete afternoon session per child?
What does the manager say about food?

options.text: Children with allergies should bring their own food.
Children may bring healthy snacks with them.
Children are given a proper meal at 5 p.m.

questions.question: What is different about arrangements in the school holidays?

options.text: Children from other schools can attend.
A greater number of children can attend.

questionGroups.instructions: What information is given about each of the following activities on offer? Choose FIVE answers from the box and write the correct letter, A–G, next to Questions 16–20.

sections.title: Part 3
sections.passage: You will hear a conversation between Holly and Dr Green about Holly's work placement.

questionGroups.instructions: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.question: Holly has chosen the Orion Stadium placement because
Which aspect of safety does Dr Green emphasise most?

options.text: ensuring children stay in the stadium
checking the equipment children will use

questions.question: What does Dr Green say about the spectators?

options.text: They can be hard to manage.

questions.question: What has affected the schedule in the past?

questionGroups.instructions: What do Holly and her tutor agree is an important aspect of each of the following events management skills? Choose SIX answers from the box and write the correct letter, A–H, next to Questions 25–30.

options.text: doing one thing at a time

sections.title: Part 4
sections.passage: You will hear a lecture about bird migration theory.

questionGroups.title: Bird Migration Theory
questionGroups.instructions: Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.

content.text:
Most birds are believed to migrate seasonally.

Hibernation theory
● It was believed that birds hibernated underwater or buried themselves in

content.question: It was believed that birds hibernated underwater or buried themselves in ______

content.text:
.
● This theory was later disproved by experiments on caged birds.

Transmutation theory
● Aristotle believed birds changed from one species into another in summer and winter.
- In autumn he observed that redstarts experience the loss of

content.question: In autumn he observed that redstarts experience the loss of ______

content.text:
and thought they then turned into robins.
- Aristotle's assumptions were logical because the two species of birds had a similar

content.question: Aristotle's assumptions were logical because the two species of birds had a similar ______

content.text:
.

17th century
● Charles Morton popularised the idea that birds fly to the

content.question: Charles Morton popularised the idea that birds fly to the ______ in winter

content.text:
in winter.

Scientific developments
● In 1822, a stork was killed in Germany which had an African spear in its

content.question: a stork was killed in Germany which had an African spear in its ______

content.text:
.
- previously there had been no

content.question: previously there had been no ______ that storks migrate to Africa

content.text:
that storks migrate to Africa
● Little was known about the

content.question: Little was known about the ______ and journeys of migrating birds until the practice of ringing was established

content.text:
and journeys of migrating birds until the practice of ringing was established.
- It was thought large birds carried small birds on some journeys because they were considered incapable of travelling across huge

content.question: large birds carried small birds because they were considered incapable of travelling across huge ______

content.text: - Ringing depended on what is called the

content.question: Ringing depended on what is called the ______ of dead birds

content.text:
of dead birds.
● In 1931, the first

content.question: In 1931, the first ______ to show the migration of European birds was printed

content.text: to show the migration of European birds was printed.
